explanation: The code begins by generating a list of prime numbers less than 500 using the Sieve of Eratosthenes algorithm. It then initializes a 2D array to store the number of ways to express integers as sums of primes. It fills this array with values that represent the number of ways to express each integer up to 500 using the primes generated. Finally, it prints out each integer along with the total number of ways it can be expressed as a sum of prime numbers.
name: 2010-11-23_pe77
subject: PE77
summary: This project implements a program that calculates the number of ways to express integers as sums of prime numbers using dynamic programming.
